headline: Bitcoin May Surge to $24K on 50% Stock Plunge

article.summary: Bitcoin’s drop to $23,980 remains the worst-case scenario as weaker ETF flows and low US demand show big investors are still cautious.

headline: Germany's KNDS Owners Sell 25% Stake Pre-IPO

article.title: Germany, KNDS Family Owners Agree on Stake Sale Ahead of IPO
article.summary: Families that own half of tankmaker KNDS NV agreed to sell a 40% stake to the German government, according to people familiar with the matter, paving the way for one of Europe’s key defense companies to go public.

headline: Core PCE Inflation Jumps 4.1% in May

article.title: Fed’s Favorite Gauge Is Seen Showing Faster Inflation
article.summary: The latest update to the Federal Reserve’s favorite inflation gauge is unlikely to challenge a growing consensus at the US central bank around the need for interest-rate hikes this year.
